summary: Verified deploy-log WebSocket streaming fix end-to-end via UI. Login, project wizard, deploy, live log stream, history replay on reload, and delete all work. The reported bug ('connecting...' with no logs) is FIXED.
seed_data_creation: Created TESTPROJ_ws project and deleted it at end of test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WebSocket endpoint wss://<host>/api/ws/projects/{id}/logs?token=<jwt> works. On login page (input has data-testid login-username-input/login-password-input). SSL select is shadcn Select (click trigger, then click SelectItem text). Wizard flow: name/repo/branch -> Next -> Next -> pick SSL 'None (HTTP only)' -> Next -> Create Project (data-testid wizard-create-btn). Detail page has tab-config/tab-logs/tab-container, deploy-action-btn, delete-action-btn, confirm-delete-btn, ws-status-dot, deploy-log-viewer.

verification_details.final_run_status: error - Docker not available (EXPECTED in sandbox)
verification_details.logs_replayed_on_reload: Yes - viewer showed all 8 lines after page reload + tab-logs click (viewer text length 539)
verification_details.delete_flow: Clicked delete-action-btn -> confirm-delete-btn -> redirected to /projects (project removed)
